architectural_purpose: deterministic classification and audit of orchestration-planning coordination boundaries

boundary_records.explanation: boundary intelligence is experimental audit evidence only and does not enable runtime capability
coordination structures are planning-only evidence and do not select runtime paths
prohibited coordination state is intentionally blocked: execution authorization is prohibited
prohibited coordination state is intentionally blocked: orchestration execution is prohibited in v3.8 coordination foundations
prohibited coordination state is intentionally blocked: routing, scheduling, and dispatch are prohibited
prohibited coordination state is intentionally blocked: graph traversal execution is prohibited
coordination boundary v3_8_fail_visible_uncertainty_boundary is supported as deterministic audit evidence
coordination boundary v3_8_non_execution_coordination_boundary is supported as deterministic audit evidence
coordination boundary v3_8_non_routing_scheduling_dispatch_boundary is supported as deterministic audit evidence
unknown coordination state lacks deterministic support evidence: unknown coordination capabilities must remain fail-visible until explicitly modeled
unknown coordination state lacks deterministic support evidence: unknown runtime states cannot be inferred as supported coordination behavior
unsupported coordination state remains fail-visible: autonomous orchestration remains outside deterministic coordination foundations
unsupported coordination state remains fail-visible: coordination optimization is not modeled by v3.8 foundations
unsupported coordination state remains fail-visible: runtime coordination execution is outside the v3.8 foundation scope

classification_semantics.experimental: audit-only evidence with no runtime capability
classification_semantics.non_executable: explicit confirmation that execution behavior is absent
classification_semantics.planning_only: coordination evidence only, not runtime path selection
classification_semantics.supported: deterministically supported as planning coordination boundary evidence
classification_semantics.unknown: not enough deterministic evidence exists and kept fail-visible
classification_semantics.unsupported: not currently supported and kept fail-visible

explicit_limitations: v3.8 Phase 2 does not enable orchestration execution
v3.8 Phase 2 does not enable runtime coordination engines
v3.8 Phase 2 does not enable routing, scheduling, dispatch, or traversal execution
v3.8 Phase 2 does not enable optimization or recommendation systems
v3.8 Phase 2 does not enable execution authorization
v3.8 Phase 2 does not enable callable coordination flows
v3.8 Phase 2 does not enable persistent runtime mutation
v3.8 Phase 2 does not enable hidden transitions or silent fallback behavior
